name: Galactoboureko: Greek Filled Custard Dessert
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the custard: Scald the milk and let it cool to warm. Mix sugar and farina in a bowl.
2. Beat eggs separately until fluffy. Slowly beat some of the egg mixture into the milk-farina mixture on medium speed, then return all of the egg mixture back to the milk-farina mixture and blend well.
3. Cook the custard slowly on low heat, stirring constantly until thick, about 20 minutes. Let it cool completely and chill.
4. Assemble: Butter 6 whole filo sheets and overlap them in a buttered 9 x 13 pan so that part of the filo extends over the edges of the pan. Spread the custard mixture evenly on top, then flip the edges of the filo to cover the filling. Cover with another 6 buttered filo sheets, overlapping and covering as before.
5. Work quickly to prevent the filo from drying out. Score the pastry into thirds prior to baking.
6. Bake in a 350°F oven for 20-30 minutes or until golden.
7. Prepare the syrup by boiling all ingredients together for 10 minutes. Pour hot syrup over the cooled pastry.
